results.rendered_html:
kopin (von kup oder kopa)
1〉 adj.
a〉 zornig  AK. 3,1,32 .  R. 3,16,29 . mayi kopinī  GĪT. 10,3 . akopitā f. das Freisein von Zorn  MĀRK. P. 28,29 .
— b〉 am Ende eines comp. aufregend, reizend: śoṇitapittakopin  SUŚR. 1,199,15 .
— 2〉 m. eine Art Taube (jalapārāvata)  RĀJAN. _im_ ŚKDR.

results.rendered_html:
kopin a. [avaśyaṃ kupyati kup-ṇini]
1 Angry, irritated; satyamevāsi yadi mayi kopinī  Gīt. 10. 
2 Causing anger.
3 Irritating, causing disorder of the humours of the body.
— m. A water-pigeon.
